room.caption: [BTB_ZP] Zephyr pls.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(34) global.mapTeleport=41
global.partySplit=0
instance_create(0,0,oBTB_ZephyrStupidEvent)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(3) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Had enough yet? No? Here's more!" signSize=1
stringToShow="Okay, that was mean. I won't do that again." signSize=1
stringToShow="Well... yeah I would. Anyway that's all I decided to make. Proceed." signSize=2
shiftTime=0 shiftMax=48 moveSpd=2 bScaling=0 bShowLine=0 direction=270
